# terrible_community_general_ip_netns (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against

### Optional

- `state` (String) Whether the namespace should exist.
